reasoning: SPY at 657.30, having gapped up overnight +$1.42 to 655.88, is testing the lower edge of the 654.87–658.73 premarket range. BULL ribbon stack is confirmed (Fast 657.91 > Pivot 657.72 > Slow 656.52, 139¢ spread). Price sits just below the dual resistance zone at 658.20–658.52. The battle level is 658.52 (Carry ★★, 5-day RTH high at $1.22 above current price). If held, this level would be the first decisive test of overnight bullish structure. Below, 654.87 (premarket low, Active support) provides a tight floor $2.43 down. The configuration favors bulls: break above 658.52 targets 660+ round-number resistance; failure below 654.87 retraces to 652–645 shelf. Early-session consolidation likely given the wide premarket range has already been traversed.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 658.20 on first test and reclaims 658.52

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below 654.87 with volume
